data.title: Consolidate ticket-list.sh and ticket-show.sh to single python3 process using ticket_reducer.llm_format
data.description: Update plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list.sh and plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-show.sh to replace the current 2-subprocess pattern (reducer → importlib dance for llm format) with a single python3 invocation that imports ticket_reducer directly and calls to_llm from ticket_reducer.llm_format. The combined python3 script: (1) imports reduce_all_tickets / reduce_ticket from ticket_reducer; (2) imports to_llm from ticket_reducer.llm_format; (3) runs reduction + formatting in one process. Remove the importlib/spec_from_file_location dance. testing_mode: GREEN (c3ef-7f7c covers subprocess count verification).
